entry: From the desk: The drop×bounce lab found a 4.934%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 6.0%, and regime classification is live on 4 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting. Not a trading system yet — but the evidence pile is growing every cycle, and that's the job today.
good_signals: the drop×bounce lab found a 4.934%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 6.0%
regime classification is live on 4 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
